source.name: Lab 2.1: Exploring the Actions Folder - dispatcher method
source.instructions: **Fill in the blank. To send a message to the user, the action calls `dispatcher.________(text="...")`.**
source.text: To send a message to the user, the action calls `dispatcher.<<<utter_message>>>(text="...")`.
source.guidance: The CollectingDispatcher method to send a text message to the user is `utter_message()`. You call it as `dispatcher.utter_message(text="Your message here")`.

text: To send a message to the user, the action calls `dispatcher.
